purpose: Define the infrastructure, data architecture, and phased rollout plan for a Kakao Business Channel chatbot serving SharePlan's subscription sharing customers.
design_intent: Build logging-first infrastructure to capture and structure conversation data before any automation. The chatbot system is completely isolated from the publisher/scheduler system. All AI automation is additive and gated behind kill-switches.
change_impact: New subsystem only. No changes to publisher, scheduler, observer, or any existing API routes. Route POST /kakao-webhook is separate from the /api/* namespace.
isolation_guarantee: The publisher, scheduler, and observer systems must not be called, referenced, or affected by any Kakao chatbot code. These are two independent products sharing one Express server.

business_context.payment_method: Korean bank transfer (IBK기업은행, account 43414622001010, owner 최웅비)
business_context.service_flow: customer inquires → price negotiation → email/Google ID collection → payment confirmation → Google Family invite → A/S follow-up

pricing_at_spec_date.note: Prices visible in historical chat data; may drift — do not hardcode in automation without re-verification

production.name: SharePlan
production.use: Live customers. Do not connect skill blocks until dev channel is validated.

development.name: (테스트)shareplan-dev
development.use: Safe test target. Connect skill blocks here first for all testing.

channel_architecture.note: Both channels share App 1433640. Target via channel handle in Open Builder skill scenarios — the API key itself is the same.

bizmessage_app.purpose: AlimTalk and FriendTalk (Phase 5 only). Pre-approval and business verification complete.
bizmessage_app.note: Do not use this app for skill webhook handling — that belongs to app 1433640.

openbuilder_skill.note: 0 blocks connected is the safe Phase 1 state. Apply blocks only on dev channel during Phase 4 testing.
openbuilder_skill.hmac_verification: Not yet implemented. KAKAO_SKILL_SECRET env var is reserved. For now, bot ID validation provides a basic spoofing guard.

historical_csv.format: CSV with header: DATE, USER, MESSAGE

speaker_taxonomy.customer: any other USER value — the customer

knowledge_base_template.note: Kakao native FAQ format. Import/export via Channel Partner Center dashboard. Empty template exported for schema reference.

unified_message_schema.description: Single schema used for both live (webhook) and historical (CSV ingested) messages

fields.conv_id: string — bot user ID for live; CSV basename (without .csv) for historical
fields.speaker: 'operator' | 'menu' | 'customer'
fields.user_id: string — Kakao user ID (live) or customer display name from CSV (historical)

meta.block_id: string? — Open Builder block ID (live only)
meta.intent_id: string? — Open Builder intent ID (live only)

phase_roadmap.name: Webhook Infrastructure
deliverables: lib/kakaoSkill.ts — types, validator, JSONL logger, response builder
POST /kakao-webhook in server.ts
KAKAO_WEBHOOK_ENABLED kill-switch in config/env.ts
artifacts/kakao-history/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl live logging
Bot ID guard (KAKAO_OPENBUILDER_BOT_ID validation)
phase_roadmap.acceptance: Webhook returns 200 + valid Kakao 2.0 JSON within 3s; message appears in daily JSONL file

phase_roadmap.name: Historical Data Ingestion
deliverables: scripts/kakao-ingest.ts — CLI that reads all CSVs and writes unified JSONL
data/kakao-processed/conversations.jsonl — single merged output
Speaker normalization: SharePlan → operator, SharePlan(메뉴) → menu, other → customer
conv_id derived from CSV filename
Idempotent: re-running overwrites output deterministically
phase_roadmap.acceptance: All 156 CSVs parse without errors; conversation count matches file count; speaker field is always one of operator/menu/customer
phase_roadmap.data_note: Do not modify source CSVs. Write output only to data/kakao-processed/.

phase_roadmap.name: Annotation & Labeling Tooling
deliverables: Label taxonomy definition (intent classes, topic tags, sentiment)
scripts/kakao-annotate.ts — CLI or simple web UI for reviewing and labeling turns
Labeled output: data/kakao-annotated/conversations.jsonl (labels field populated)
phase_roadmap.acceptance: At least 50 conversations annotated; annotation format validates against unified_message_schema

phase_roadmap.name: Knowledge Base Population
deliverables: FAQ extraction from annotated data — identify high-frequency Q&A pairs
scripts/kakao-kb-export.ts — generates knowledge-base-import.xlsx matching Kakao KB schema
Populated xlsx with Category1-5 hierarchy mirroring known topics
Manual import into Kakao Channel dashboard (no API for this operation)
phase_roadmap.acceptance: Generated xlsx passes Kakao import validation; at least 20 FAQ entries covering top customer intents
phase_roadmap.note: Knowledge base auth key in .env as KAKAO_BIZ_CLIENT_SECRET area — exact env var TBD when Kakao KB API is investigated

phase_roadmap.name: Auto-Reply with OpenAI
deliverables: Intent classification: OpenAI classifies incoming utterance against known intent taxonomy
Response generation: retrieves matching FAQ from KB or generates from annotated examples
lib/kakaoAutoReply.ts — wraps OpenAI call, respects KAKAO_AUTOREPLY_ENABLED kill-switch
3-second timeout compliance: immediate ACK if LLM call cannot complete in time
Dev channel only until operator validates reply quality

model.rationale: Isolated from xAI/Grok used by the publisher advisor. Separate env var, separate module, no cross-dependency.

phase_roadmap.acceptance: Auto-reply enabled on dev channel; 10 manual test conversations pass operator review; kill-switch works
phase_roadmap.gate: Phase 3 annotation must be complete; operator must explicitly enable KAKAO_AUTOREPLY_ENABLED

env_additions.effect: Kill-switch for POST /kakao-webhook. Returns 503 when false.
Bot ID validation on incoming skill payloads. Null = no validation.
Admin key for outbound channel API calls (Phase 3+).
Reserved for HMAC signature verification of inbound skill requests. Not yet wired.
App 1377955 REST API key for BizMessage (AlimTalk/FriendTalk), Phase 5+.
App 1377955 비즈니스 인증 client secret. Used for AlimTalk sender token exchange.
Channel identifier. Origin unclear — verify this is the plusFriendId before using in API calls.
Base URL for Kakao Talk Channels API.
OpenAI API key for auto-reply intent classification and response generation.
Kill-switch for LLM auto-reply. Must be explicitly enabled by operator.

safety_constraints: Publisher, scheduler, and observer code must never be imported or called from any Kakao module.
KAKAO_WEBHOOK_ENABLED defaults to false — must be explicitly opted in.
KAKAO_AUTOREPLY_ENABLED defaults to false — operator must enable after reviewing Phase 4 output.
Auto-replies must only be enabled on dev channel (@mtq2kdq3ndpthyz) until operator validates quality.
Operator manual chat is never disabled — the webhook logs and optionally replies; it does not replace the admin center.
Historical CSV source files must never be modified — ingest script writes to data/kakao-processed/ only.
Credentials (bank account, phone number, customer emails) visible in CSV data must never be logged to live JSONL or included in LLM prompts without anonymization.
open_questions: KAKAO_CHANNEL_ID value origin unclear — verify it is the plusFriendId for @shareplan before using in API calls.
KAKAO_SKILL_SECRET value origin unclear — locate in Open Builder → Skills → Security Settings to confirm.
ngrok URL (tortile-edmund-overboastful.ngrok-free.dev) is tied to a free account — it persists across restarts but requires ngrok running on Windows. Consider Tailscale or a VPS for production.
Kakao Knowledge Base API availability — investigate whether KB can be updated programmatically or requires manual dashboard import.
OPENAI_API_KEY not yet added to .env — add when Phase 5 work begins.
